entries.en-US: If you discover a security vulnerability in ECC, please report it responsibly.
entries.zh-Hans: 如果您在 ECC 中发现安全漏洞，请负责任地报告。

entries.en-US: **Do not open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.**
entries.zh-Hans: **请勿为安全漏洞创建公开的 GitHub 议题。**
请改为发送邮件至 **<security@ecc.tools>**，内容需包含：

entries.en-US:
- A description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- The affected version(s)
- Any potential impact assessment
entries.zh-Hans:
* 漏洞描述
* 复现步骤
* 受影响的版本
* 任何潜在的影响评估

entries.en-US:
- **Acknowledgment** within 48 hours
- **Status update** within 7 days
- **Fix or mitigation** within 30 days for critical issues
entries.zh-Hans:
* **确认通知**：48 小时内
* **状态更新**：7 天内
* **修复或缓解措施**：对于关键问题，30 天内

entries.en-US: If the vulnerability is accepted, we will:
entries.zh-Hans: 如果漏洞被采纳，我们将：

entries.en-US:
- Credit you in the release notes (unless you prefer anonymity)
- Fix the issue in a timely manner
- Coordinate disclosure timing with you
entries.zh-Hans:
* 在发布说明中注明您的贡献（除非您希望匿名）
* 及时修复问题
* 与您协调披露时间

entries.en-US: If the vulnerability is declined, we will explain why and provide guidance on whether it should be reported elsewhere.
entries.zh-Hans: 如果漏洞被拒绝，我们将解释原因，并提供是否应向其他地方报告的指导。

entries.en-US:
- The ECC plugin and all scripts in this repository
- Hook scripts that execute on your machine
- Install/uninstall/repair lifecycle scripts
- MCP configurations shipped with ECC
- The AgentShield security scanner ([github.com/affaan-m/agentshield](https://github.com/affaan-m/agentshield))
entries.zh-Hans:
* ECC 插件及此仓库中的所有脚本
* 在您机器上执行的钩子脚本
* 安装/卸载/修复生命周期脚本
* 随 ECC 分发的 MCP 配置
* AgentShield 安全扫描器 ([github.com/affaan-m/agentshield](https://github.com/affaan-m/agentshield))

entries.en-US:
- **AgentShield**: Scan your agent config for vulnerabilities — `npx ecc-agentshield scan`
- **Security Guide**: [The Shorthand Guide to Everything Agentic Security](./the-security-guide.md)
- **OWASP MCP Top 10**: [owasp.org/www-project-mcp-top-10](https://owasp.org/www-project-mcp-top-10/)
- **OWASP Agentic Applications Top 10**: [genai.owasp.org](https://genai.owasp.org/resource/owasp-top-10-for-agentic-applications-for-2026/)
entries.zh-Hans:
* **AgentShield**：扫描您的代理配置以查找漏洞 — `npx ecc-agentshield scan`
* **安全指南**：[The Shorthand Guide to Everything Agentic Security](./the-security-guide.md)
* **OWASP MCP Top 10**：[owasp.org/www-project-mcp-top-10](https://owasp.org/www-project-mcp-top-10/)
* **OWASP Agentic Applications Top 10**：[genai.owasp.org](https://genai.owasp.org/resource/owasp-top-10-for-agentic-applications-for-2026/)
